name: cloudflare-blade-mcp
title: Cloudflare Edge Platform
description: Manage your Cloudflare stack — DNS, Workers, Pages, R2, KV, D1, Tunnels, Vectorize, AI Search, AI Gateway, Workers AI, and cache purge. 78 tools with token-efficient output and safety gates on all writes.
tagline: Full-stack Cloudflare management from DNS to deploy
author: groupthink-dev
contract_notes: edge-platform-v1/v2 was retired in pack-spec 2.0.0 (DD-181). Cloudflare blade declares the four decomposed contracts directly. D1, Tunnels, Pages, Vectorize, AI Search, AI Gateway, Workers AI, and Cache are exposed as native tools.

tools.name: cf_dns_list_zones
tools.description: List DNS zones in the account with optional filters (name, status, account_id).

tools.name: cf_dns_get_zone
tools.description: Get details for a single zone by ID or domain name.

tools.name: cf_dns_list_records
tools.description: List DNS records for a zone with rich server-side filters (type, name, content, proxied, comment, tag).

tools.name: cf_dns_get_record
tools.description: Get a single DNS record by zone_id + record_id.

tools.name: cf_dns_export_records
tools.description: Export a zone's DNS records in BIND format. Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing zone scope and record count.

tools.name: cf_dns_create_record
tools.description: Create a new DNS record in a zone. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_dns_update_record
tools.description: Update an existing DNS record. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_dns_delete_record
tools.description: Delete a DNS record. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_dns_bulk_create
tools.description: Bulk-create DNS records in a zone. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_dns_bulk_update
tools.description: Bulk-update DNS records in a zone. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_kv_list_namespaces
tools.description: List KV namespaces in the account.

tools.name: cf_kv_list_keys
tools.description: List keys in a KV namespace with optional prefix filter and cursor pagination.

tools.name: cf_kv_get
tools.description: Get the value of a single KV key.

tools.name: cf_kv_put
tools.description: Put a KV key-value pair. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_kv_delete
tools.description: Delete a KV key. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_kv_bulk_put
tools.description: Bulk-put KV key-value pairs. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_kv_bulk_delete
tools.description: Bulk-delete KV keys. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_d1_list_databases
tools.description: List D1 databases in the account.

tools.name: cf_d1_get_database
tools.description: Get details for a single D1 database.

tools.name: cf_d1_query
tools.description: Run a read-only SELECT-style SQL query against a D1 database. Emits `_meta` envelope; ordering remains `unstable` for user-driven SQL (DD-338 B.1.b PRIMARY architect lock).

tools.name: cf_d1_execute
tools.description: Execute a mutating SQL statement (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/CREATE/DROP) against a D1 database. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_d1_export
tools.description: Export a D1 database as SQL. Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing database scope and table count.

tools.name: cf_d1_list_tables
tools.description: List tables in a D1 database. Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing database scope.

tools.name: cf_d1_describe_table
tools.description: Describe schema for a single D1 table. Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing database + table scope.

tools.name: cf_tunnel_list
tools.description: List Cloudflare Tunnels in the account.

tools.name: cf_tunnel_get
tools.description: Get details for a single Cloudflare Tunnel.

tools.name: cf_tunnel_create
tools.description: Create a new Cloudflare Tunnel. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_tunnel_delete
tools.description: Delete a Cloudflare Tunnel. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_tunnel_list_configs
tools.description: List ingress configurations for a Cloudflare Tunnel. Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing tunnel scope.

tools.name: cf_tunnel_update_config
tools.description: Update ingress configuration for a Cloudflare Tunnel. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_tunnel_list_connections
tools.description: List active connections for a Cloudflare Tunnel. Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing tunnel scope.

tools.name: cf_workers_list_scripts
tools.description: List Workers scripts in the account.

tools.name: cf_workers_get_script
tools.description: Get details for a single Worker script.

tools.name: cf_workers_list_deployments
tools.description: List deployments for a Worker script.

tools.name: cf_workers_create_deployment
tools.description: Create a new deployment for a Worker script. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_workers_list_versions
tools.description: List versions of a Worker script.

tools.name: cf_workers_list_secrets
tools.description: List secret names bound to a Worker script (values not returned). Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing script scope.

tools.name: cf_workers_put_secret
tools.description: Put a secret on a Worker script. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_workers_delete_secret
tools.description: Delete a secret from a Worker script. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_workers_get_schedules
tools.description: Get cron schedules for a Worker script.

tools.name: cf_workers_put_schedules
tools.description: Replace cron schedules for a Worker script. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_pages_list_projects
tools.description: List Cloudflare Pages projects in the account.

tools.name: cf_pages_get_project
tools.description: Get details for a single Pages project.

tools.name: cf_pages_list_deployments
tools.description: List deployments for a Pages project.

tools.name: cf_pages_get_deployment
tools.description: Get details for a single Pages deployment.

tools.name: cf_pages_rollback
tools.description: Roll back a Pages project to a previous deployment. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_pages_list_domains
tools.description: List custom domains attached to a Pages project. Emits `_meta` envelope disclosing project scope.

tools.name: cf_pages_purge_build_cache
tools.description: Purge the build cache for a Pages project. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_r2_list_buckets
tools.description: List R2 buckets in the account.

tools.name: cf_r2_get_bucket
tools.description: Get details for a single R2 bucket.

tools.name: cf_r2_create_bucket
tools.description: Create a new R2 bucket. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: cf_r2_delete_bucket
tools.description: Delete an R2 bucket. Destructive — double-gated.

tools.name: cf_cache_purge
tools.description: Purge Cloudflare cache by URL, tag, host, prefix, or everything. Destructive — gated by confirm.

highlights.text: DNS — zones, records, bulk import/export across all your domains
Workers — scripts, deployments, settings, bindings, versions, secrets, cron schedules
Pages — projects, builds, rollback, domains, cache purge
R2 — bucket lifecycle, location hints, storage classes
KV — namespace provisioning, key-value CRUD, bulk operations
D1 — database provisioning, tables, queries, schema inspection, export
Vectorize — index lifecycle and metadata-index management
AI — AI Search, AI Gateway observability, and Workers AI inference

readme:
### What it does

Cloudflare Edge Platform gives your AI agent operational control over Cloudflare infrastructure — DNS records, Workers, Pages, R2, KV, D1, Tunnels, Vectorize, AI Search, AI Gateway, Workers AI, and cache — through 78 purpose-built tools.

Your agent can check DNS propagation, provision KV/D1 storage, wire Worker bindings, inspect Vectorize indexes, query AI Search, review AI Gateway logs, run Workers AI diagnostics, roll back a broken Pages deploy, rotate a Workers secret, query a D1 database, and purge cache in a single conversation. No context switching between dashboards.

### Token efficiency

Cloudflare API responses are large and noisy. Raw responses waste context window on pagination metadata, empty fields, and internal IDs your agent will never use.

Each tool includes a **concise formatter** that extracts only the fields that matter. A typical `list_zones` call returns ~200 tokens instead of ~800. Across a session with dozens of API calls, this saves thousands of tokens and keeps your agent focused.

### Safety model

The plugin follows a read-free, write-gated pattern:

- **Reads** work immediately — list zones, get records, inspect deployments, review AI Gateway logs
- **Writes** require `confirm: true` — create records, put secrets, provision KV/D1/Vectorize resources, run Workers AI inference
- **Destructive operations** are double-gated where practical — delete namespaces/databases/indexes require explicit confirmation and exact-name checks

This means your agent can explore your infrastructure freely but must be explicit about changes. Accidental deletions are structurally prevented.

### Domain coverage

| Domain | Tools | What you can do |
|--------|-------|-----------------|
| DNS | 10 | Zones, records, bulk create/update, BIND export |
| Workers | 13 | Scripts, settings, bindings, deployments, versions, secrets, cron triggers |
| Pages | 7 | Projects, builds, rollback, custom domains, build cache |
| R2 | 4 | Buckets with location hints, jurisdiction, storage class |
| KV | 9 | Namespace provisioning, key CRUD, bulk put/delete |
| D1 | 9 | Database provisioning, tables, SQL query/execute, schema, export |
| Tunnels | 7 | Create, configure, connections, ingress routing |
| Vectorize | 8 | Index lifecycle, operational info, metadata indexes |
| AI | 10 | AI Search queries, AI Gateway CRUD/logs, Workers AI model search/run |
| Cache | 1 | Purge by URL, tag, host, prefix, or everything |

env.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
env.description: Cloudflare API token with permissions for the Cloudflare services you enable: DNS, Workers, KV, D1, Tunnels, Pages, R2, Vectorize, AI Gateway, AI Search, Workers AI, and Cache Purge

env.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
env.description: Cloudflare Account ID — required for account-level tools including KV, D1, Tunnels, Workers, Pages, R2, Vectorize, and AI

env.name: MCP_API_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token for HTTP transport authentication (optional, only needed for HTTP mode)

setup.blurb: Manage DNS, Workers, Pages, R2, KV, D1, Tunnels, Vectorize, AI, and Cache. 78 tools with token-efficient output.
setup.help_text: Create a custom API token at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens. Grant only the service permissions you plan to use: Zone DNS Edit, Account Workers Scripts/KV/D1/Tunnel/R2/Vectorize/AI permissions, Pages access, and Zone Cache Purge. Tokens can be scoped to specific zones if you only need DNS.

fields.label: API Token
fields.help: Custom token with the Cloudflare service permissions you plan to use

fields.label: Account ID
fields.help: Found on the account overview page in the Cloudflare dashboard

scenarios.label: Deploy and verify a Worker update
scenarios.body: List Worker versions, create a new deployment with traffic split, check cron schedules are intact, then purge cache for the affected routes.

scenarios.label: Investigate a broken Pages deploy
scenarios.body: List recent Pages deployments, compare production vs preview builds, check custom domain DNS records, and rollback to the last successful deploy if needed.

scenarios.label: Provision storage and bindings for a Worker
scenarios.body: Create the required KV namespace, D1 database, and Vectorize index, then upsert Worker bindings so the script can access them.

scenarios.label: Debug an AI-backed Worker flow
scenarios.body: Query AI Search, inspect AI Gateway logs for errors or latency, list Workers AI models, and run a small inference smoke test.

scenarios.label: Audit infrastructure for a domain migration
scenarios.body: Export DNS records for the old zone, list D1 databases and KV namespaces tied to the domain's Workers, and verify tunnel configurations before cutting over.

conformance.notes: Contract conformance remains scoped to dns-authoritative-v1, object-storage-v1, kv-v1, and functions-v1. Newly added D1 provisioning, Vectorize, AI Search, AI Gateway, Workers AI, Tunnels, Pages, and Cache operations are native tools outside the current v1 service contracts. Source validated at Git commit 78941d68db1c0fd2942d455c9fa9bf16ccebefd4; Nix source narHash sha256-jehNVTQhwxWBJYKNxDMD/Ay0w+YcNaYTKHgmtuYjHw0=.

certification.security_notes: First-party network API blade. Uses Cloudflare scoped API token from environment; destructive operations require confirm gates and exact-name checks where practical. Nix source narHash: sha256-jehNVTQhwxWBJYKNxDMD/Ay0w+YcNaYTKHgmtuYjHw0=.
